title: Decoding allosteric landscapes: computational methodologies for enzyme modulation and drug discovery

primary_findings.comprehensive_review: Recent advancements in computational methodologies for allosteric site identification and characterization
primary_findings.key_techniques: MD simulations, enhanced sampling, NMA, evolutionary analysis, machine learning
primary_findings.significance: Provides systematic approaches for allosteric modulator discovery and design

allosteric_mechanism_understanding.regulatory_principle: Ligand binding at allosteric sites modulates active site activity
therapeutic_advantage: Enhanced specificity compared to orthosteric inhibitors
allosteric_mechanism_understanding.discovery_challenge: Inherent complexity makes systematic discovery difficult

molecular_dynamics_simulations.insight_type: Protein conformational changes and energy landscapes

advanced_tools_and_platforms.integration: Tools enhance understanding of allosteric mechanisms

modulator_advantages: Reduced adverse effects from off-target binding
Combination therapy synergy with orthosteric agents

future_directions.methodology_advancement: Continued development of integrated computational approaches
future_directions.application_expansion: Wider adoption of allosteric modulators in drug discovery
future_directions.success_metrics: Improved efficiency in identifying novel allosteric modulators
